creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

For the record before committing the update I tested the port in poudriere running head r308209 from Nov 2.

In r309124 [1] the llvm/clang suite has been updated in head. This looks like a good candidate for the cause of such a failure on head.

I'm unable to test right away with a newer head, it will take me a few days to update my environment for that.

I'll try to let you know as soon as I have news.


[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=309124
